summary: Read and write Notion pages and databases for team knowledge workflows.
Operate Obsidian vaults for markdown-first personal knowledge management.
Access and organize Apple Notes as a lightweight memory backend.
Inspect, annotate, and rewrite PDF content through natural language.
Create, inspect, and edit Word and DOCX documents with reliable formatting and compatibility checks.
Fetch and read YouTube transcripts for review, summarization, and extraction workflows.
Manage Trello boards, lists, and cards for lightweight project coordination.
Design and maintain cross-tool automations that reduce repetitive manual work.
Fetch current and forecast weather for location-based workflows.
Query multiple global and China-friendly search engines with advanced search operators.
Search the web and extract content through the Brave Search API.
Use Baidu AI Search for live web lookup, docs, and research topics.
